title: Salty Gooey Kenyan Cheese Stir-fry
description: A delicious and comforting pescatarian-friendly date-night dish featuring gooey cheese stirred into a spicy sauce with tender vegetables for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Place the tandoori chicken pieces on a baking sheet. Drizzle with cooking oil and sprinkle with soy sauce, red curry paste, and chopped scallions. Bake for about 25 minutes or until fully cooked.

While the chicken is baking, prepare the peppers by finely chopping them into bite-sized pieces. Heat the same amount of cooking oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the bell peppers and sauté for about 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium and add tomato puree, feta cheese (in chunks), and enough water to cover the vegetables if needed. Cook for about 5 minutes until it starts thickening.
Mix in the cooked chicken pieces with the peppers and cheese sauce. Serve hot.
